test_description: Verify VPC creation with correct CIDR blocks and subnet segmentation
business_risk: Network isolation failure leading to security vulnerabilities
test_steps: 1. Query AWS API for created VPC; 2. Validate CIDR block matches variable; 3. Count public vs private subnets; 4. Check route tables for NAT Gateway associations
expected_result: VPC exists with correct CIDR, private subnets route to NAT GW, public subnets route to IGW
security_considerations: Subnets must be private by default

test_description: Validate EKS Control Plane logging and private endpoint access
business_risk: Cluster compromise or lack of auditability
test_steps: 1. Inspect EKS cluster configuration via AWS API; 2. Verify public_access_cidrs is restricted; 3. Verify enabled_cluster_log_types includes audit, api, authenticator
expected_result: Public access restricted to VPN CIDR, all log types enabled

test_description: Verify pgvector extension availability and persistence
test_steps: 1. Connect to PostgreSQL; 2. Execute 'CREATE EXTENSION vector'; 3. Create a test table with vector column; 4. Reboot instance; 5. Verify extension remains active
expected_result: pgvector extension installs and persists across reboots

test_description: Enforce MFA for Admin and Finance roles
business_risk: Unauthorized access to sensitive financial functions
test_steps: 1. Create user with Admin role; 2. Attempt login without MFA setup; 3. Verify challenge response requires MFA setup; 4. Complete MFA setup; 5. Verify subsequent logins require TOTP
expected_result: Login blocked until MFA configured; TOTP required for token issuance

test_description: Validate JWT Strategy rejects expired tokens
test_steps: 1. Generate a JWT signed by correct key but with 'exp' in the past; 2. Pass token to JWT Strategy validate() method; 3. Assert UnauthorizedException is thrown

test_description: Verify RoleGuard denies access to insufficient privileges
test_steps: 1. Authenticate as 'VENDOR'; 2. Request protected Admin endpoint; 3. Verify 403 Forbidden response; 4. Authenticate as 'ADMIN'; 5. Request same endpoint; 6. Verify 200 OK response
expected_result: Access denied for Vendor, allowed for Admin

test_description: Verify mutation requests are logged to OpenSearch
test_steps: 1. Send POST request to create resource; 2. Wait for async log push; 3. Query OpenSearch index for document matching Request ID; 4. Verify user ID, IP, payload, and timestamp in log
expected_result: Audit log document exists with all metadata
performance_expectations: Async push, no API latency impact

test_description: Validate Vendor creation with unique constraints
test_steps: 1. Call createVendor with valid DTO; 2. Verify success; 3. Call createVendor again with same unique field (e.g., tax ID); 4. Verify conflict error
expected_result: First create succeeds, second throws 409 Conflict

test_description: Verify messages are published to correct queue
test_steps: 1. Call sendToQueue() with payload; 2. Poll LocalStack SQS for messages; 3. Validate message body matches payload
expected_result: Message is present in the queue

test_description: Verify memory stability during large CSV parsing
test_steps: 1. Trigger parsing job; 2. Monitor Node.js heap usage during stream; 3. Verify heap does not grow linearly with file size; 4. Verify all rows processed

test_description: Generate error report CSV correctly
test_steps: 1. Pass array of errors (row #, error msg) to service; 2. Service generates CSV stream; 3. Verify CSV headers and content match input
expected_result: Valid CSV string generated with correct error mapping

test_description: Extract text from diverse file formats
test_steps: 1. Provide PDF with text; 2. Provide PDF with scanned images (OCR required? verify scope); 3. Provide DOCX; 4. Verify text output for each

test_description: Verify removal of sensitive entities (Email, Phone, SSN)
test_steps: 1. Input text: 'Call me at 555-0199 or email user@test.com'; 2. Call redact method; 3. Assert output contains [PHONE] and [EMAIL] placeholders instead of raw data

test_description: Validate JSON schema compliance of LLM output
test_steps: 1. Send redacted SOW text; 2. Receive JSON response; 3. Validate JSON against Zod schema (ProjectBrief structure); 4. Ensure required fields (timeline, deliverables) are present

test_description: End-to-End SOW processing flow
test_steps: 1. Upload file to S3; 2. Send 'SOW_UPLOADED' event; 3. Wait for 'PROCESSING' status; 4. Wait for 'PROCESSED' status; 5. Verify extracted data in DB
expected_result: File processed, status updated, data persisted

test_description: Create Payment Link wraps Stripe API correctly
test_steps: 1. Call createPaymentLink with amount/currency; 2. Verify Stripe SDK called with correct parameters (price_data, success_url); 3. Return mock URL

test_description: Reject webhooks with invalid signatures
test_steps: 1. Generate webhook payload; 2. Sign with WRONG secret; 3. Send POST to webhook endpoint; 4. Verify 400 Bad Request / Signature Verification Failed

test_description: Handle duplicate webhook events gracefully
test_steps: 1. Send 'payment.succeeded' event ID 'evt_123'; 2. Verify processing succeeds; 3. Send 'evt_123' again; 4. Verify processing skipped/acknowledged without side effects
expected_result: Second request returns 200 OK but does not re-process

test_description: Generate embeddings for input text
test_steps: 1. Input text string; 2. Call embedding service; 3. Verify returned array matches expected dimension (e.g., 1536 for ada-002)

test_description: Vector search latency under load
test_steps: 1. Generate query vector; 2. Execute cosine similarity search; 3. Measure execution time; 4. Verify top results are nearest neighbors

test_description: Orchestrate embedding and search to return Vendor DTOs
test_steps: 1. Trigger matching for project; 2. Service generates brief embedding; 3. Service queries repo; 4. Service maps results to Vendor DTOs with scores; 5. Verify score sorting

test_description: Validate state transitions for Payout
test_steps: 1. Initialize Saga in 'PENDING'; 2. Trigger 'Approve'; 3. Assert state 'PROCESSING'; 4. Trigger 'Success'; 5. Assert state 'COMPLETED'; 6. Try invalid transition (Completed -> Pending); 7. Assert error

test_description: Double-entry ledger consistency
test_steps: 1. Create Payout Transaction; 2. Debit Escrow Account; 3. Credit Vendor Account; 4. Verify sum of debits equals credits; 5. Verify total system balance is 0 change

test_description: Compensation logic (Rollback) on payment failure
test_steps: 1. Start Payout Saga; 2. Ledger Debit succeeds; 3. Payment Gateway calls fails; 4. Saga triggers compensation; 5. Ledger Debit reversed (Credit); 6. Final state is FAILED, Ledger balanced
expected_result: System returns to consistent state after failure

test_description: Verify split-pane layout and data loading
test_steps: 1. Navigate to SOW Review page; 2. Verify PDF rendered in left pane; 3. Verify extracted data form in right pane; 4. Verify data matches API response

test_description: Validate form input rules (Zod)
test_steps: 1. Clear required field; 2. Attempt submit; 3. Verify error message; 4. Enter invalid date format; 5. Verify error message; 6. Correct data; 7. Verify submit enabled

test_description: Dashboard load time under data load
test_steps: 1. Login as Admin; 2. Measure time to interactive; 3. Verify all widgets loaded; 4. Verify no layout shift

test_description: Verify token-based access control for proposal submission
test_steps: 1. Navigate to portal with expired token; 2. Verify Access Denied / Expired page; 3. Navigate with valid token; 4. Verify Form Load; 5. Submit proposal; 6. Try to reuse token; 7. Verify Access Denied
